memoryArtifacts.headline: Tomb of Sir Robert Wingfield and Elizabeth Goushill.jpg
memoryArtifacts.description:
Canopied Tomb of Sir Robert Wingfield and Elizabeth Goushill in St. Mary Church in Leatheringham. Tomb was destroyed in a period of ignorance and neglect during the 17th Century.

Photo submitted by Bruce Morrison on findagrave.com

zh.Letheringham, Suffolk, England: 英國素福爾可列黑林加姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert Wingfield of Letherington於大約1403年出生在英國素福爾可列黑林加姆時，他的父親Robert Wingfield27歲，母親Elizabeth Russell30歲。他於1421年8月18日之前與Elizabeth Goushill在英國素福爾可結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1449年在英國賀特福爾被列為member of parliament for hertfordshire。他去世於1454年11月21日之前在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國素福爾可列黑林加姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert Wingfield of Letherington于大约1403年出生在英国素福爾可列黑林加姆时，他的父亲Robert Wingfield27岁，母亲Elizabeth Russell30岁。他于1421年8月18日之前与Elizabeth Goushill在英国素福爾可结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1449年在英国賀特福爾被列为member of parliament for hertfordshire。他去世于1454年11月21日之前在他的家乡，埋葬在英国素福爾可列黑林加姆。

nameMeanings.name: Wingfield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Winfield
meanings: English: habitational name from Wingfield in Derbyshire, Bedfordshire, Suffolk, and Wiltshire. The Derbyshire placename probably derives from Old English winn ‘pasture, meadow’ + feld ‘open country’. The Bedfordshire placename may derive from Old English wince ‘nook, corner’ + feld. The Suffolk placename may derive from the Old English personal name Wiga + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas (genitive -inga-) or Old English wīg ‘idol’ + feld. The Wiltshire placename derives from the Old English personal name Wina + Old English feld.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: possibly a metonymic occupational name for a fisherman, from orfe, a species of freshwater fish. Alternatively, a habitational name from Urff near Kassel, formerly Orpha.

nameMeanings.name: Letherington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Hetherington in Wark (Northumberland) or from Harrington (Northamptonshire), both from the Old English personal name Hǣthhere + Old English connective -ing- + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. This surname has been established in Ireland (Laois, Tyrone) since the 16th century.

variants.name: Etherington
meanings: in northern England, a variant of   Hetherington  .

in southern England perhaps a variant of the now extinct surname Atherington, a habitational name from Atherington (Sussex). The placename is from the Old English personal name Ēadhere + -ing (connective particle) + tūn ‘estate, settlement’. This surname seems to have lost its medial -ing-. See Etherton .

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old Norse, originally a byname meaning ‘bride, wife’; in mythology the name of Thor's golden-haired wife.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Wingfield of Letherington was born about 1403, in Letheringham, Suffolk, England, his father, Robert Wingfield, was 27 and his mother, Elizabeth Russell, was 30. He married Elizabeth Goushill before 18 August 1421, in Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 5 daughters. In 1449, at the age of 47, his occupation is listed as member of parliament for hertfordshire in Hertfordshire, England. He died before 21 November 1454, in his hometown, and was buried in Letheringham, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert Wingfield of Letherington est né environ 1403, à Letheringham, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Robert Wingfield, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Russell, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Goushill avant 18 août 1421, à Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 5 filles. En 1449, à l’âge de 47 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est member of parliament for hertfordshire à Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Il est décédé avant 21 novembre 1454, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Letheringham, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.Saint Mary Church, Reddish, Stockport, G: Saint Mary Church, Reddish, Greater Manchester, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert Wingfield of Letherington um 1403 in Letheringham, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Wingfield 27 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Russell 30. Er hat vor 18. August 1421 in Suffolk, England Elizabeth Goushill geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 5 Töchter. 1449, als er 47 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als member of parliament for hertfordshire in Hertfordshire, England aufgeführt. Er starb vor 21. November 1454 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Letheringham, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Wingfield of Letherington è nato il circa 1403 nel Letheringham, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Robert Wingfield, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Russell, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Goushill prima del 18 agosto 1421, nel Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 5 figlie. Nel 1449, all'età di 47 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come member of parliament for hertfordshire nel Hertfordshire, England. Morì prima del 21 novembre 1454, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Letheringham, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Wingfield of Letheringtonが約1403年にイギリススフォルクレスエリンガムで生まれた時，父Robert Wingfieldは27歳，母Elizabeth Russellは30歳であった。1421年8月18日以前にイギリススフォルクでElizabeth Goushillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。1449年，47歳の時，イギリスハートフォードシュアイアでの職業はmember of parliament for hertfordshireと記録されている。彼は1454年11月21日以前に故郷で死去し，イギリススフォルクレスエリンガムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Wingfield of Letherington(이)가 대략 1403년 영국 수폴크 레더잉함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Wingfield(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Russell(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1421년 8월 18일 이전 영국 수폴크에서 Elizabeth Goushill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1449년, 47세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 허트퍼드실르에서 member of parliament for hertfordshire이었다. 그는 1454년 11월 21일 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 레더잉함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Wingfield of Letherington nasceu aproximadamente 1403, em Letheringham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Wingfield, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Russell, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Goushill antes 18 de agosto de 1421, em Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 5 filhas. Em 1449, com 47 anos, sua profissão aparece como member of parliament for hertfordshire em Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu antes 21 de novembro de 1454, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Letheringham, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.Saint Mary Church, Reddish, Stockport, G: сеинт мэри чурч, реддиш, гритир манчестир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert Wingfield of Letherington родился около 1403 г. в местности летирингхам, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Wingfield было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Russell, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Goushill перед 18 августа 1421 г. в местности суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 5 дочерей. В 1449 году, в возрасте 47 лет,  он работал по профессии member of parliament for hertfordshire в местности хиртфордшир, Англия. Он умер перед 21 ноябрь 1454 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности летирингхам, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert Wingfield of Letherington nació aproximadamente 1403, en Letheringham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Wingfield, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Russell, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Goushill antes de 18 de agosto de 1421, en Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 5 hijas. En 1449, a la edad de 47 años, su ocupación registrada era member of parliament for hertfordshire en Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Murió antes de 21 de noviembre de 1454, en su pueblo, y fue sepultado en Letheringham, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
